name: Magnet Bonding
name_jp: マグネット・ボンディング
desc:
During the Main Phase: Activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each effect of "Magnet Bonding" once per turn);
● Add 1 "Conduction Warrior Linear Magnum Plus Minus" or 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster from your Deck to your hand.
● Add 1 Level 8 "Magna Warrior" monster from your Deck to your hand.
● Fusion Summon 1 Rock Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling Rock monsters from your hand, field, GY, and/or banishment into the Deck as material.
eff:
During the Main Phase: Activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each effect of "Magnet Bonding" once per turn);
● Add 1 "Conduction Warrior Linear Magnum Plus Minus" or 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster from your Deck to your hand.
● Add 1 Level 8 "Magna Warrior" monster from your Deck to your hand.
● Fusion Summon 1 Rock Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling Rock monsters from your hand, field, GY, and/or banishment into the Deck as material.

mentions: Conduction Warrior Linear Magnum Plus Minus
action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
Returns Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon to Deck
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Uses the player's banished cards as Fusion Materials
Can only use certain Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
